# Jonaed Ali Shuvro

Website:
https://www.jashuvro.com

Role:
Full Stack Engineer & Flutter Mobile Specialist

Experience:
3.5+ years of active software engineering.

Core Focus:
Fluid mobile animations (Flutter) + Robust backend database architectures (NestJS, Laravel, Node.js).

Primary Technologies:
- Mobile Development: Flutter, Dart, Riverpod, GetX, SQLite cache
- Web Development: React, Next.js, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS
- Server Architectures: Node.js, NestJS, Laravel, Express.js, REST APIs, WebSockets gateway routing
- Data Storage & ORMs: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL, Prisma, Sequelize, Mongoose

Core Case Studies:
1. Flirtmetrics DATING PLATFORM: Optimized card deck state management in Flutter to 60 FPS and reduced chat delivery latency from 8s to <200ms using event-driven WebSockets and local SQLite cache.
2. ERP Platform AGRO-INDUSTRIAL CORP: Replaced manual Excel ledgers and signature workflows with automated parallel approval state machines and quarter-partitioned PostgreSQL database views, reducing discrepancies to <0.8% and latency to <30 minutes.
